landing.sub: Whether you’re throwing it, working it, or hosting it — start here.

comingSoon.vndrBody: EvntCue’s Vndr portal opens to a curated first cohort. Verified vendors get matched to weddings and celebrations already on the platform — deposits flow through Stripe, and your calendar fills with events that fit.
comingSoon.venuSub: Open your calendar to qualified bookings
comingSoon.venuBody: EvntCue’s Venu portal opens this summer. Every request comes with date, guest count, and budget pre-qualified. Send back your packet, see deposits flow in through Stripe, and watch your calendar fill with the right kind of events.
comingSoon.success: On the list. We’ll be in touch the moment we open.

calculator.title: Budget Calculator
calculator.sub: Real DFW pricing. Drag whatever. Math keeps up.
calculator.subtypeSub: We’ll start your line items at DFW averages for that subtype, scaled to your guest count. You can adjust anything next.
calculator.megaHint: Past 500 covers, our team scopes events one-on-one — venue holds, catering tiers, AV rigging.

warning.leadCalm: {label} events typically need {months}+ months of lead time — you’re comfortably inside that window.
warning.leadTightDanger: {label} events typically need {months}+ months of lead time — venue holds, vendor calendars, and permits fill up early. Expect a tighter shortlist and premium pricing for last-minute slots.
warning.leadTightWarn: {label} events typically need {months}+ months of lead time — venue holds, vendor calendars, and specialty bookings fill up early.
warning.coverLow: At {guests} guests, your event is much smaller than DFW typical for {label} (~{typical} guests). Cue can scope a more intimate vendor list — some packages and venue minimums won’t apply.
warning.coverHigh: At {guests} guests, your event runs larger than DFW typical for {label} (~{typical} guests). Larger venues, expanded AV, and tier-up catering are likely needed.
warning.budgetLowTail: Vendor matches will skew budget-tier; some specialty options will be out of reach.
warning.budgetHighTail: Cue can scope premium and luxury-tier matches at this per-guest spend.

preview.yourDateSub: Picked from your {horizon} window — adjust anytime.
preview.yourDateFoot: This is what locks first — your Venu confirms against this date, then everything else scopes around it. You can change it later in the dashboard.
preview.cueCalmHeadline: Cue says — you’re in the normal planning window.
preview.cueTightHeadline: Cue says — this is very tight.
preview.cueBudgetFarBelow: Cue says — this budget is far below DFW typical.
preview.cueBudgetLuxury: Cue says — this budget is luxury-tier territory.
preview.cueCoverFar: Cue says — your cover count is well outside DFW typical.
preview.cueShortNotice: Cue says — this is short notice.
preview.cueBudgetLean: Cue says — your budget is on the lean side for DFW.
preview.cueBudgetAbove: Cue says — your budget runs above DFW typical.
preview.cueCoverAtypical: Cue says — your cover count is atypical for DFW.
preview.leadCalm: Most {plural} need {months}+ months of lead time — you’ve got room to breathe.
preview.leadTightDanger: Most {plural} need {months}+ months of lead time — venue holds and permits fill up early.
preview.leadTightWarn: Most {plural} need {months}+ months of lead time — venue holds and specialty bookings fill up early.
preview.coverLow: At {guests} guests, your event runs smaller than DFW typical ({typical} guests). Cue can scope a tighter, more intimate vendor list.
preview.coverHigh: At {guests} guests, your event runs larger than DFW typical ({typical} guests). Larger venues, expanded AV, and tier-up catering are likely needed.
preview.perGuestBelow: Per-guest at ${perGuest} sits below the DFW typical (~${typical}/guest) for a {noun} of this scope. Vendor matches will favor budget-tier; some specialty options will be out of reach.
preview.perGuestAbove: Per-guest at ${perGuest} sits above the DFW typical (~${typical}/guest) for a {noun} of this scope. Cue can scope premium and luxury-tier vendor matches.
preview.perGuestCalm: Per-guest at ${perGuest} aligns with the DFW typical (~${typical}/guest) for a {noun} of this scope.
preview.cueCardBody: for your {noun}. Sign up and I’ll match vendors who fit your budget and style, draft your timeline, and send you five board-matched shortlists you can compare side by side.
preview.plnrSub: Cue’s read on your budget tier
preview.plnrBodyEm: Your event sits where a full-service Plnr earns their keep.
preview.plnrBody: They own your timeline end-to-end, fight for you on vendor contracts and commission stacking, know the cultural traditions cold, and save you weeks of late-night coordination.
preview.vendorsSub: Venu first — everything else scopes around it
preview.vendorChipVndrHint: Florals, photo, music, AV — unlocks with Venu
preview.vendorFootnote: Catr and Vndr matches unlock once your Venu is booked. Every other vendor scopes around the venue’s catering rules, AV setup, and date — so locking the venue first saves rework.
preview.ctaSub: Sign up free — your budget carries over, vendor browsing unlocks, escrow is ready.

login.signupSub: Your budget, milestones, and mood board are waiting. One step from here.
login.signinSub: Sign in to pick up where you left off.
login.confirmHint: Open the link on this device so we can finish wiring your event into the workspace. The link expires in an hour.
login.footTerms: By continuing you agree to EvntCue’s terms.

dashboard.menuSettingsToast: Settings sheet lands in a future session.
dashboard.menuSwitchEventToast: Multi-event switching lands when bookings flow.
dashboard.cueAskToast: Cue is here. What do you need?
dashboard.tileGuestsUpgradeToast: Guest features unlock at $19.99/mo. Upgrade flow lands in Phase 4.
